use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Destructive action buttons with confirmation workflows
Secondary and outline buttons for multi-step processes
Ghost and link buttons for navigation elements
Icon buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support, class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management, and standard Tailwind CSS styling with accessible focus rings and disabled states. Supports the asChild pattern for slotting into other components.
